body:
Alex,

I noticed Vercel currently has 113 open roles across Products, Core Platform, and Security. Companies in this stage often face challenges scaling engineering capacity quickly enough to meet product demands. Tenacious supports teams with managed Python and data engineering squads that integrate closely with your existing workflows. If it sounds useful, would you be open to a 30-minute discovery call next week to explore potential fit?

Best,  
[Your Name]  
Research Partner, Tenacious  
gettenacious.com
subject: Note on your 113 open engineering roles
